speaker: MATT
raw_text: And we're going to start with rolling initiative when we return.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I really feel like this is like something and it might attack us, and it might kill us. I don't know, maybe--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: A second one begins to emerge from the water behind you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What is going on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Mighty Nein!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is it spheres?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're essentially looking at reverse whirlpools that are rising up out of the water, coming to a point as the water seems to be almost guiding itself.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh jesus, wide at the bottom, thin at the top.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to take my two shurikens and (throwing noises) into one and see what happens.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Roll for attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: From Kentucky, it's sure-ooh-ken.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll for an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: For two? Both of them?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That first one is an 18, so 25. And the second one is 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Both of them hit. Go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I think this is a thing. Like a thing to kill.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Before she even says that, roll some damage. Because this is all happening very quickly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nine-- sorry. 12. 13 total, 13.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Quick, let me check one thing real fast.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They are impervious to throwing star damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, okay. So, good to know. So it was nine and--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 13 total.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, got you. You watch as both enter the water, and it seems to react, pull back and a spray of water hits the wall behind it. You watch as it quivers and then suddenly you see these two large pseudopods of water somehow emerge from it, and you see for a moment this angry face (snarling) in the water towards you as both of them begin to rush in towards you in the center of the chamber.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We're going to go ahead and take a break there. (groaning)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right friends. So, last we left off. I need you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We're going to go ahead and take a break there. (groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And we're going to start with rolling initiative when we return.

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: Yay!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So for our giveaway at the break, to remind you guys, we've had to make some changes. So you need to enter in the Critical Role Twitch chat, so if you need to jump over to twitch.tv/criticalrole to join the chat there to be part of this giveaway. It's only good for residents of the U.S. and Canada, excluding Quebec because of weird giveaway laws. But however, you do get the possibility of winning this fantastic purple heart dice tower system! Including the Osmet Coast cartography by Deven Rue.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: This is so cool!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is the one you had last campaign right?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, but not with a map on it. That's amazing!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Fantastic Deven Rue's the artist. But yeah, so the word tonight is "ruby." R-U-B-Y.

preceding_turns.speaker: CAST
preceding_turns.text: Ruby!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Only enter it once or you will be disqualified, but go ahead and jump over.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Best lay ever!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We'll have a winner announced when we return here in a few minutes. So, see you guys here in a few minutes. [break]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hello everyone, and welcome back. So, we have our winner during the break. The winner of our fantastic Wyrmwood giveaway is Darksearchman. Congratulations, dark man who searches, the searcher who lives in the dark, Darksearchman. You are the winner. We'll get that back to you as soon as we have the opportunity. So we'll get your info and congratulations.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm Mr. Darksearchman. (laughing)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Algar shouts it off to Zsundie down below. Let's roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What is the distance from where we are to the terrace balcony space that they're on?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd say roughly 80 or so feet. At this point, Zsundie comes to a stop and looks over his shoulder in your direction and goes, "Oh. Intruders." Algar shouts off, "What? How?" and holds up his lantern and focuses the beam over across the way there. You guys, even though you're up against the wall, there's nothing to hide behind. The light pushes past a few of you and then stops. He shouts off, "Dispatch them quickly!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Who says that? Zsundie?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Matt's gone, I guess. Oh, he's back!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Excuse me for a moment of preparation here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's real water. And colored lights!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is the difficulty of doing this.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, Melora.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: This is dope, man! Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Did you think we were going to get to this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I didn't know if you were. This is the difficulty of doing this in here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Dungeons & Dragons just broke!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I know, that's all right. We will fix this, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You sounded like Bob Ross as he was saying that. It's all happening nicely.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's so worth it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And with that, guys--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Give it to me now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'd like you guys to place yourselves, if you can, where you would be on this side of the chamber as you enter. There is Zsundie.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, what? He's awesome-looking.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And there is the large elemental where you had seen him. The worker has run past and vanished into the chamber before, and there on the top, looking over the terrace, the dwarven bodyguards right there. And that's Algar right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He's the tall one?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, he's the tall one right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Matt, I'm putting Frumpkin in this corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're not in the room, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, we haven't come in yet. We were all hiding in this little thing. I'm putting you in the back, Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure. I mean, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that was our lineup.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So you can hop up. Oh, that's true. That was our lineup.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I was stealthing so hard, I'm playing with the McElroys right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So how far is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For that right there? To Algar, from you? Somewhere in the neighborhood of 60 to 70 feet. You're not entirely sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You said roll for initiative?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, got to roll for initiative.
